title: JAR HEADS Rubber Jar Opener Gripper Pad 5 Pack - Thick 5 Inch Grippers for Opening Jars Made in the USA - Jar Opener for Weak Hands & Seniors with Arthritis
description:
About this item
Get a grip! Now open any jar, container, or bottle effortlessly with our 1mm thick rubber jar opener gripper pad. Our 5-inch round anti-slip food grade Jar Opener is made from real rubber with texture that makes it easy to grip and open even the most stubborn jar
Thick and Durable: If you have ever tried other jar openers, you know they tend to fall apart and make a mess. Our rubber jar openers for weak hands are made in usa out of 100% post-consumer recycled tires, an eco-friendly practice that benefits everyone
Ease of Use: Our jar opener for seniors with arthritis helps open any stubborn jar effortlessly. Our thick & sturdy rubber jar opener helps people with weak hands & people who have lost hand strength
Washing Instructions: Our Jar Opener Gripper Pad are easy to wash. Just simply hand wash them with warm soapy water. Do not use in dishwasher
Jar heads promise: At jar heads we stand by our products and offer a 30 day no questions asked warranty, if you experience any issues with your jar heads product, simply contact jar heads directly through the amazon messaging system and we will be happy to assist you with any questions, issues, or difficulties you encounter. 100% customer satisfaction is what we strive for at jar heads
reviews_5s:
Now I can open any and all jar lids by myself!These are well made and work great. Perfect size as well. And absolutely love that they’re made in USA!!! HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!!I love these grippers for opening jars and other containers. I have broken both of my wrists in the past which weakened my grip in both hands, plus I am getting on up there age-wise, so I have been struggling to open containers for awhile now. I finally got tired of struggling and ordered these grips. I got the larger size because I buy protein powder, which usually comes in a larger container, and these grips work like magic for me! I have been able to open everything that I needed to open since I got these grips. The only thing that I would suggest is that it would be nice if the larger size grips also came in a variety of colors like the smaller suze grips do. I like pretty colors better than black, but I got the black ones because that's the only color there was in the larger size and the larger size was what I needed.They work great, just have a smell to them!The right thickness. Cost more but well made.Flexible, not stiff like other brands These are easy on my hands even when I have to use a tight grip on stubborn jars, etcI use these to install oil filters! Nice and thick with great grip!These wonderful things will replace some very thin rubber jar openers that I have had for 35 years....they show their age. Over the many years I have bought SO many different types of jar openers. What a waste of quite a bit of $$. In my long experience, if you can't break the seal quickly with the end of a bottle opener, you MUST have a rubber jar opener.

THESE are thicker than what I have used in the past and are a little larger than my 35 year old things that are 5-3/4". I knew that what is usually offered is 5" and those things are a tiny bit too small. JAR HEADS are thick enough and not too thick. With 5 of them, I can put two in the kitchen in different drawers, I can have one in the garage, one in my tool box (yes, women have tool boxes), one in my bathroom drawer for stuck on nail polish bottles and such.
I'm pretty sure these will be the last jar openers I will ever need to buy, and my heirs will likely fight over them 20 years from now.I have small hands. Getting hold/grip of large lids is very hard. Then to twist to open is close to impossible. These rubber grips work well.Works just as described!!
reviews_1s:
They say they are made in America. They have a stamp on them that reads Jarhead. Maybe it was stamped in America but the rubber smells just like some products I’ve received from China. It’s a strong petroleum smell that gets on your hands. I washed numerous times with Dawn detergent and they still smell.
It does work on opening jars.This smells so bad stinky rubber. I left them out side for two weeks, still smell badly.Bought this before; no issue. Now- strong rubber snell is toxic. Tried everything - will not come out.I don’t know if this is just my order but these items all had a very strong “gasoline” smell that made my whole drawer smell so I tossed them out !These jar openers smelled so bad that I was not comfortable placing them in a kitchen drawer that might come in contact with eating utensils. I tried washing them, placing on the counter to air out..nothing worked. Threw them away. Waste of money.These jar openers work but leave your hands smelling like rubber for hours. Threw them away and found jar openers that don't have that rubber smell.Seemed to be high quality. HOWEVER, they stink! Left them out in the garage, out on the porch for days, still stink. Left them for use in the the shop rather than indoors.The rubber smell was overwhelming. I’m sure the grip would have been great but I couldn’t have them in my house.I'm really surprised at the numerous positive reviews. These grippers don't have any traction and slide around. Totally unusable.These work but have a very potent rubber smell.
